title: TetrisCraft
description: This puts a Tetris mini-game right inside your Minecraft game, so you can play it any time you're bored.
body:
TetrisCraft is a mod that brings Tetris into Minecraft. You can play it directly from the main menu or if you're just on the pause screen. It includes the usual things like pieces dropping, clearing lines, getting points, and the speed picks up as you play. To control it, you'll use either WASD or your arrow keys.

![TetrisCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1262520051a32df0f4188da33b70c9f1dd9ec72e_0.webp)

Inspired by nukebob!
https://modrinth.com/user/nukebob
https://modrinth.com/mod/tetrismc
